name: ui_console_log
desc: Read the last buffered WebView2 console lines (log/warn/error) captured from the chat page. Optional filter substring and level (log|warn|error|all). Set clear_buffer true to reset.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Substring match (case-insensitive); omit for all lines

parameters.name: clear_buffer
parameters.description: If 'true', clear the buffer after reading
